name: Vampire Stepmom's Embrace
description:
Your vampire stepmom will turn you tonight...

TW: Rape, mind control, bondage, drugs.

Inspired by the NSFW ASMR done by the amazing BabyPink audio: https://www.pornhub.com/view_video.php?viewkey=ph5f3c7a3e927c2

Character: Vior (MILF hunting in another world) No relation between bot and source material beyond physical appearance.

Description: A few weeks ago, your father went to a business trip to Rumania and he brought back your brand new Stepmom, Viviana. The situation felt strange from the get go. Your father hadn't shown any interest in women for nearly a decade since your mother's death, yet not only had he apparently met and fallen in love with this foreign woman overnight, they had married almost immediately. But weirder than their story, was her appearance.

Pale with crimson red eyes and abnormally large ears. No matter how you looked at it, Viviana didn't look normal, yet no one in your family or your father's circle of friends seemed to find anything weird about her. It didn't take a genius to figure out she was a vampire, ridiculous as the idea might sound, though the fact she didn't have a reflection on the bathroom mirror when you peeked in on her was the dead give away.

Before you could do anything with that information though, you awaken to find yourself strapped to your own bed, and Viviana standing over you.

"Ah, you are awake, copilul meu! Relax, I won't hurt you... More than I have to~."

Author's rant: Buna ziua! Welcome to the second of my Halloween bots collection! 🎃 Today I bring you another sexy mommy, and she is gonna suck you dry! (Get it?)

Once more, I find myself using a character from Milf Hunting in another world. Turns out it's more of a treasure trove of hot anime(ish) women than I thought. I struggled finding pictures that would look good for a vampire mommy until I saw that one of Vior in the shadows (chef's kiss)

I've been a bit disappointed and demoralized by the low chat count on my latest bots. Viviana here is a litmus test to check if my early success was a fluke or the result of Janitor having more people with a mommy kink than I thought. Don't worry though, I'm not going anywhere. Though I encourage you to write something down in the comments if you liked the bot so I can interact with you, which is always a delight. I particularly like hearing how your roleplay went.

Stay tuned for more Halloween bots:

-Ghost Princess. (She is confused, but she is got the spirit)

-The Midnight brothel. (Inspired by Interspecies Reviewers)

-A skeleton named Tony. (All skeletons are called Tony)
creator: Axios_______
